summary: Career Suite v10 - Comprehensive testing completed. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All tabs and UI elements verified. 14-column Kanban renders correctly. Critical issue: Supabase DB CHECK constraint needs migration to support new statuses (wishlist, networking, assessment, reference_check, negotiating, withdrawn).

critical.issue: Adding jobs with new statuses (wishlist, networking, assessment, reference_check, negotiating, withdrawn) fails with 500 error due to Supabase CHECK constraint on job_applications.status column
critical.fix: Run SQL migration to update CHECK constraint: ALTER TABLE job_applications DROP CONSTRAINT job_applications_status_check; ALTER TABLE job_applications ADD CONSTRAINT job_applications_status_check CHECK (status IN ('wishlist','networking','saved','applied','phone_screen','assessment','interview_scheduled','interview_completed','reference_check','offer_received','negotiating','job_won','rejected','withdrawn'));

ui_bugs.issue: Search button click via Playwright automation has visibility issues, but UI elements are present and backend API works correctly

action_items: CRITICAL: Run Supabase SQL migration to update job_applications.status CHECK constraint to include 6 new statuses: wishlist, networking, assessment, reference_check, negotiating, withdrawn
critical_code_review_comments: Backend code at /app/backend/routers/career_suite.py line 539 defines 14 statuses but Supabase DB only allows 8 - needs migration
Frontend Kanban at /app/frontend/public/career-suite.js line 263 correctly renders 14 columns
seed_data_creation: Test jobs created with TEST_ prefix using 'saved' status (valid per current DB constraint)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Career Suite v10 features tested. All 14 Kanban columns render in frontend. Backend tracker endpoint returns all 14 statuses. However, adding jobs to new statuses (wishlist, networking, assessment, reference_check, negotiating, withdrawn) fails due to Supabase CHECK constraint. Studio v2 endpoints (website-intel, campaigns) working - return empty lists as expected. Resume/Cover Letter PDF/DOCX exports working. Email Signatures Copy HTML button present with data-testid='sig-copy-html-btn'. Job Search API returns real results from Tavily.

backend: GET /api/career/v2/tracker - Returns 14 kanban statuses (wishlist, networking, saved, applied, phone_screen, assessment, interview_scheduled, interview_completed, reference_check, offer_received, negotiating, job_won, rejected, withdrawn)
POST /api/career/v2/tracker - Works with 'saved' status, fails with new statuses due to DB constraint
POST /api/studio/website-intel - Returns 400 with empty URL (validation works)
frontend: Career Suite navigation - sidebar link works with data-view='career'
Career Suite tabs - Overview, Job Search, Tracker, Resume, Cover Letter, LinkedIn, Salary, Network, Signatures all present
Overview tab - Feature cards visible (Job Search, Job Tracker, Resume Builder, Digital Cards, Email Signatures, AI Career Coach, Interview Prep, Video Backgrounds)
Tracker tab - 14 Kanban columns visible (Wishlist, Networking, Saved, Applied, Phone Screen, Assessment, Interview, Completed, Ref Check, Offer, Negotiating, Won!, Rejected, Withdrawn)
Tracker tab - Quick Add form with Job title, Company, URL inputs and Add button
Tracker tab - Job cards displayed with move buttons
Resume tab - Form fields render (Full Name, Job Title, Email, Phone, Location, LinkedIn, Website)
Resume tab - 'Autofill from DNA' button visible
Resume tab - 'Save & AI Enhance' button visible with data-testid
Resume tab - Headshot Photo and Background Image upload buttons visible
Cover Letter tab - Generation form renders with resume/job description textareas
Cover Letter tab - Style options (Direct, Storytelling, Technical) visible
Cover Letter tab - 'Generate Cover Letter' button visible
Email Signatures tab - Form renders with all fields (Full Name, Job Title, Company, Headline, Email, Phone, Website, LinkedIn, Instagram, Twitter/X)
Email Signatures tab - 'Copy HTML' button visible with data-testid='sig-copy-html-btn'
Email Signatures tab - 'Add to Email' button visible
Email Signatures tab - Template options (Executive, Classic, Modern) visible
Job Search tab - Search input, Location input, Remote checkbox, Search button all present

supabase_migration_sql: ALTER TABLE job_applications DROP CONSTRAINT job_applications_status_check; ALTER TABLE job_applications ADD CONSTRAINT job_applications_status_check CHECK (status IN ('wishlist','networking','saved','applied','phone_screen','assessment','interview_scheduled','interview_completed','reference_check','offer_received','negotiating','job_won','rejected','withdrawn'));
